occupation: Business Division Manager - Displays at GDS Global Display Solutions
headline: Helping executive and project managers to achieve outstanding results through electronic and digital-display solutions in business and product strategy and execution
summary:
S.E.T. FOR YOUR NEEDS!

If I were a tool, what tool would I be?
A digital smart interface device!

WHY?
I've the following SET of elements in common with this tool: SIMPLIFY, ENABLING, TECH.
And they answer to your following needs…

SIMPLIFY your work life:
in the complex word of customized devices and tailor-made Turnkey solutions in continuous evolution, simplify and making easier the life of project, purchase and operations managers on customer and supplier side is key to set a successful project, reduce time and maximize the Return of Investment.

ENABLING your ideas to come true:
if you are a product or marketing manager in charge to deliver the best user experience you know also how challenging it is to deploy an amazing idea in a real object or system: this is where I take care to enable an idea to become reality through seamless teamwork between customer and supplier, connecting the right expertise.
Important projects also face budget or cash-flow constraints and if you are a CFO you will probably look for a set of financial solutions: I can help shape around your needs financial tools enabling a sustainable balance sheet.

TECHNOLOGY to make you not only better than your competitors but INNOVATIVE:
as technology has been my passion since I was a child, I have decades of experience and mindset about tech things and a technical methodology applied to different sectors and environments so that you can take advantage of my cross-industry technology and know-how approach.

I have a customer-centric attitude and I like to lead by example, working with colleagues and customers from different countries in a GLocal way to generate value for whole team and develop and deliver extraordinary projects and products that are visible in the everyday people life.

+++SOME EXAMPLES?
Look at your coffee machine at your next espresso, with high probability the smart interface is produced by GDS.
Don’t have time to make the coffee by yourself? Take the car, go to the drive thru of the most famous coffee chain, you will look at our outdoor display.
If you have the opportunity, take a look at the Dubai futuristic EXPO metro station, with the world longest optically enhanced LCD videowall.
Just to name some of the industries where you can find us: RAILWAYS, SMART CITIES, RETAIL, DooH, QSR, APPLIANCES, MARINE, MEDICAL, VENDING MACHINE...

I help customers to achieve incredible results by acting with a high level of trustworthy and tenacity and by applying my set of cross-disciplines, skills and cross-industry expertise.

Contact me to set about solutions for your needs!

experiences.title: Business Division Manager - Displays
experiences.description: Deployed several bespoke projects for electronic and digital-display solutions in the following B2B sectors: Railways, Smart Cities, Retail, DooH, QSR, Home Appliances, Marine, Medical, Vending machine, Industrial Automotive
